basic_details.job_title: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu) has published the Research Assistant Notification 2026 on its official website https://www.iimj.ac.in. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Research Assistant position on a contractual basis. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 28 years and holding a Master's degree in Economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university, along with strong analytical, research, report-writing, and data analysis skills, are eligibl

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university, Good academic record and strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills, Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and use of MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata or similar software
qualification.details: Master's degree in economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university. Good academic record and strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills. Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and use of MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata or similar software.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Jammu Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university. Good academic record and strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills. Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and use of MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata or similar software.

content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Jammu Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Jammu Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Assistant position at IIM Jammu is 12th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in economics, Management, Commerce, Environmental Studies, Sustainability Studies, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Rural Development, or a related discipline from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the IIM Jammu Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Jammu?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Jammu or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Strong analytical, research, and report-writing skills are essential. Proficiency in data collection, survey methods, statistical analysis, and software like MS Office/SPSS/R/Stata is also required.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant position at IIM Jammu is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIM Jammu?
faq.answer: IIM Jammu is located in Jammu, Jammu and Kashmir, with the pincode 181221.
